Earrings Footer

Celebrate Life's Special Moments

The major moments in life deserve a fitting celebration with those we care for the most. At Tanishq, we believe that gold jewelry adds a touch of magic to these special occasions, making them even more memorable. Explore our diverse collection of breathtaking pieces, as well as the regal gold jewelry of the Nav-raani collections.

Timeless Jewelry for Every Occasion

Gold Ring

Celebrate engagements, weddings, anniversaries, or other huge moments with a gold ring that symbolizes love, traditions, or personal achievements.

Gold Earrings

Enhance your look for special occasions like weddings, festivals, or religious ceremonies with exquisite gold earrings. Choose from delicate studs to statement-making designs.

Gold Necklace

Adorn yourself with a stunning gold necklace for weddings, festivals, or any auspicious occasion. Choose from classic chains, intricate pendants, or statement women gold necklace design that reflect your personal style.

Gold Pendant

Celebrate special moments with a personalized gold pendant featuring religious symbols, or meaningful inscriptions, as well as pieces of jewelry for formal occasions.

Gold Chai

Add a touch of elegance and sophistication to any occasion with a gold chain. Choose from classic styles, bold statement pieces, or delicate chains to complement your attire

Gold Bangles

Embrace tradition and heritage with gold bangles, perfect for weddings, festivals, or religious ceremonies. Explore a variety of designs, from sleek and modern to intricately crafted pieces.

Special Gifts for Loved Ones

Gold jewelry makes a thoughtful and lasting gift for any auspicious occasion. Celebrate big occasions with a piece from our collection – whether you’re gifting Valentine’s day jewelry, pendants with religious meaning, mother’s day jewelry gifts, or even jewelry for new born in the family. Our diverse range ensures you can find a gift that reflects the recipient's unique style and personality, making the occasion even more special for them.

Make Every Occasion Memorable with Nav-raani Collections

For a touch of royalty and auspicious charm, delve into the exquisite Nav-raani collection. Inspired by the royal Indian luxury, these handcrafted pieces are a celebration of rich cultural heritage. Nav-raani jewelry features high-brilliance Kundan work, intricate kajar details, and vibrant enamel accents. Each piece is a masterpiece, allowing you to celebrate life's special moments with a touch of opulence and sophistication.
